title: llama.cpp inference
description: Run llama.cpp inference using serverless RunPod workers!

input.name: Command line arguments for llama-server
input.description: Launch command line arguments (argv) for the llama-server binary. Do not define the port. If using caching, do not define -hf or -m here.

input.name: RunPod Cached Model
input.description: Hugging Face model repository used for cache lookup and fallback download. Also set the endpoint Model field to the same repository (or Hugging Face URL) for RunPod managed caching.

input.name: Path to GGUF file in the Hugging Face Hub model repository
input.description: Path to the GGUF file in the Hugging Face Hub model repository to use for caching. Example: model.gguf

input.name: Cache miss fallback mode
input.description: Behavior when cached model path is not found. Set to 'download' to download from Hugging Face automatically, or 'fail' to stop startup.

input.name: Maximum Concurrency
input.description: Maximum number of concurrent requests to handle (default: 8).

input.name: OpenAI Served Model Name Override
input.description: Optional stable model name exposed from the OpenAI-compatible API. Useful for tools that expect a fixed OpenAI model identifier.
